params.name: Vessoul of Nethrone
params.description: After being refined by Nethrone's soul power, the receptacle used to hold the Nethrone's mirror soul has the ability to capture people's souls. Once someone without a strong will obtains it, they will only be bewitched by the Nethrone's mirror soul; thus becoming Nethrone's doppelganger.
params.ss1:

> Troop HP +10
